hero.title: Master Web Performance
hero.description: Learn how to build lightning-fast web applications by optimizing loading, rendering, and runtime performance with real-world techniques.

performance basics.description: Understand performance fundamentals, metrics, and how browsers load web pages.

core web vitals.description: Learn LCP, CLS, INP, and how to improve real user experience metrics.

loading optimization.description: Optimize resource loading with lazy loading, code splitting, and preloading strategies.

asset optimization.description: Reduce bundle size using minification, compression, and optimized images/fonts.

rendering optimization.description: Improve rendering performance by reducing reflows, repaints, and optimizing CSS/JS execution.

network & caching.description: Use HTTP caching, CDN, service workers, and caching strategies for faster delivery.

javascript performance.description: Optimize JavaScript execution, memory usage, and event handling.

advanced optimization.description: Explore advanced techniques like SSR, hydration, edge computing, and performance monitoring.

seo.title: About This Web Performance Optimization Series
seo.description: Web performance optimization focuses on improving page speed, responsiveness, and user experience. In this series, you will learn Core Web Vitals, loading strategies, caching, rendering optimization, and advanced techniques to build high-performance web applications.
